name: write-thai-academic-book
description: Task-based drafting and Level A quality control for Thai teaching notes, books, and textbooks.

interface.shortDescription: Draft Thai academic manuscripts at Level A
interface.longDescription: Create, audit, revise, and quality-check Thai teaching notes, books, and textbooks through independent tasks, reusable artifacts, deterministic gates, and explicit human approval.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $write-thai-academic-book to perform one approved task for a Thai academic manuscript and stop for human review.
